evidence.source_title: Iran accused of assassinating its own nuclear scientist
evidence.description: Mahboobeh Hosseinpour publicly accused the IRGC Intelligence Organisation of murdering her brother Ardeshir for refusing to work on nuclear weapons, making her a target of potential surveillance and intimidation by the organisation she accused.

editorial_notes: By publicly accusing the IRGC-IO of her brother's murder, Mahboobeh became an adversarial witness against the organisation. She spoke from Turkey, suggesting she may have fled Iran.
